description: A post-incident remediation directive has been issued to implement TCP/UDP service-level monitors for critical infrastructure hosts. Read the directive located at ~/Desktop/service_monitor_directive.txt. Open ManageEngine OpManager (http://localhost:8060, credentials: admin / Admin@123). Create the four required service monitors targeting 127.0.0.1 with the EXACT names and ports specified in the directive document. Ensure all changes are saved.
